text: Aurora Storage Architecture @ mtteansanitia - @ sarancarc e All SSD Based - high IOPS, low latency e Storage is billed based on what'’s used e High water mark - billed for the most used e Storage which is freed up can be re-used * Replicas can be added and removed without requiring storage provisioning.
